# voyado_interaction_schema (Resource)

Manages a Voyado Engage [interaction schema](https://developer.voyado.com/docs/loyalty/interactions#the-interactionschemas-endpoint). The Engage API does not support in-place updates; changing `schema_id`, `display_name`, or `json_schema` replaces the resource (delete then create). Deleting a schema removes all interactions for that schema.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "voyado_interaction_schema" "form_submission" {
  schema_id    = "form-submission"
  display_name = "Form submission"
  json_schema = jsonencode({
    "$schema" = "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"
    type      = "object"
    properties = {
      name = {
        type              = "string"
        displayName       = "Name"
        showInContactCard = "true"
        sortOrder         = "0"
      }
    }
    required = ["name"]
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable name in the Engage UI (`displayName` in the API).
- `json_schema` (String) JSON-encoded object sent as `jsonSchema` (see Voyado documentation for required property metadata). Semantically equal JSON (whitespace, key order) is accepted.
- `schema_id` (String) Unique schema id (`id` in the Engage API). Allowed characters: letters, digits, `_`, and `-`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Same as `schema_id` (Engage interaction schema identifier).
